description_long: This object consists of three instant noodle cups placed on a flat, square surface. Each cup features colorful printed labels with prominent branding and food imagery, including depictions of noodles and ingredients. One cup is partially opened, revealing the foil lid peeled back and a pair of wooden chopsticks resting inside. The cups are made of lightweight, glossy plastic with foil lids, and the labels display a mix of red, black, and white colors with bold text. The cups are typical of single-serving instant noodle packaging, commonly found in urban convenience stores or street food settings. The overall arrangement suggests a casual, ready-to-eat snack scenario.
description: Three instant noodle cups with colorful labels, one opened with chopsticks, arranged on a flat surface. The packaging is glossy and features bold branding and food imagery.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the cups from an angle where the opened cup with chopsticks is most visible, and the foil lid is peeled back.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the cups from the front, displaying the branding and labels of all three cups clearly.
description_view_2: View 2 highlights the back and side of the cups, with the opened cup's interior and foil lid more visible.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the cups from behind, with the chopsticks and the back of the labels most prominent.
attribute_brand_logo: Visible brand logos on the front of each cup, featuring bold text and stylized graphics in red, black, and white, located on the main label area.
attribute_flavor_indication: Visible text and graphics on the labels indicate flavors such as 'Shrimp' and 'Udon', with food imagery supporting the flavor cues.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Some small text blocks are visible on the side and back of the cups, likely containing nutritional information, but details are not fully legible.
